leadText: Azelf (Japanese: アグノム Agnome) is a Psychic-type Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Along with Uxie and Mesprit, Azelf is one of the lake guardians created by Arceus. It is known as the Being of Willpower (Japanese: 意(い)思(し)の神(かみ) Ishi no Kami, "God of Willpower") in Sinnoh myths.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Azelf is a small, gray-blue, fairy-like Pokémon . It has two tails that each have a red jewel on them. Azelf has a partially cyan face with another red gem encrusted into its forehead. Azelf has a cone-shaped head with elf ear-like protrusions on each side. Azelf's spirit can leave its body without dying and return at will. It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to preserve the balance of the world. In the past, it has been referred to as the "Being of Willpower" due to its role in giving humans the determination to face challenges in life. Befittingly, it can control an individual's will or enter their body. Legends say that if Azelf is harmed, it can cause humans to lose all will inside of them, making them completely immobile for all eternity. Azelf is highly feared due to it having the power to manipulate the will of foes into its own puppets. It was shown in The Needs of the Three! and The Battle Finale of Legend! that it can teleport itself, as well as other Pokémon and humans. Azelf can be very cautious around people and Pokémon. However, if threatened, it will reveal its bold side. Alongside the other lake guardians , Azelf is needed for the creation of a Red Chain , either through gems extracted from its body or through its fang . Together, they're also capable of destroying a Red Chain. They even have the power to calm down Dialga or Palkia should they be enraged, but not both at once. Azelf lives in Lake Valor , specifically in the Valor Cavern at the center of the lake, thus gaining its title as a lake guardian. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , Azelf is shown to be capable of speaking human language via telepathy. Azelf and the other lake guardians are the only known Pokémon capable of learning the move Mystical Power .

Additionally in Pokémon Battle Revolution, during the Masters Battle Set 7 , Kruger will use an Azelf as part of his team. In the spin-off games [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Explorers of Time and Explorers of Darkness : Azelf is the guardian of the Time Gear of Crystal Crossing . When the player and partner arrive, Azelf has been defeated by Grovyle , but Azelf puts up a barrier to protect the Time Gear from being stolen. sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry JNS02 Azelf Goh's Rotom Phone Azelf, the Willpower Pokémon. A Psychic type. Azelf is called "The Being of Willpower." It is said to have given people the strength of mind to deal with life's difficulties.
